recovery.title: Restore Previous Connections
recovery.description: Select the connections to recover from the previous session.
recovery.rememberChoice: Remember my choice (auto-recover next time without asking)
recovery.someFailed: Some connections could not be recovered:

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your app preferences, appearance, and connections.

general.title: General
general.languageDescription: Select the language for the data editor interface.
general.safeModeDescription: Warn before executing UPDATE or DELETE queries without a WHERE clause
general.queryHistoryDescription: Save executed SQL statements to local query history
general.queryHistoryRetentionDescription: Automatically remove non-favorite history older than this period.
general.workspacePersistenceDescription: Restore open SQL tabs and editor contents after restarting the app
general.encryptLocalDataDescription: Encrypt saved query history and workspace state at rest using a key stored in your OS secure keychain.
general.encryptLocalDataHelp: Protect local history and session data stored on this device
general.trustSqlServerCertificateLabel: Trust SQL Server Certificates By Default
general.trustSqlServerCertificateDescription: New SQL Server connections will trust server certificates automatically, which is friendlier for self-signed or private-CA environments.
general.trustSqlServerCertificateHelp: Skip certificate-chain verification for new SQL Server connections unless disabled per connection

keybindings.description: System shortcuts are fixed and cannot be edited.

runQuery.label: Run query
runQuery.description: Execute SQL in the active query tab.

saveQuery.label: Save query
saveQuery.description: Save the current query to file.

saveQueryAs.label: Save query as
saveQueryAs.description: Save the current query as a new file.

beautifySql.label: Beautify SQL
beautifySql.description: Format SQL in the active editor.

openTableDesign.label: Open table design
openTableDesign.description: Open designer for the current table tab.

screenshotResultGrid.label: Screenshot result grid
screenshotResultGrid.description: Capture result grid as image with table name and timestamp.

copySelectedCells.label: Copy selected cell/row(s)
copySelectedCells.description: Copy selected data while focus is in query results.

pasteRowsIntoTable.label: Paste rows into table
pasteRowsIntoTable.description: Paste tabular clipboard data into editable table results.

appearance.description: Customize the look and feel of QuraMate.
appearance.usePointerCursorsDescription: Change the cursor to a pointer when hovering over interactive elements.

editor.description: Configure the SQL query editor environment.

ai.description: Configure AI providers for QuraMate's smart features.
ai.comingSoonDescription: AI features are currently in development. You can save your keys now for when the feature goes live.

changelogs.description: Keep track of new features, improvements, and bug fixes.

sqlServer.description: Settings that apply only to SQL Server connections.
sqlServer.trustCertificateLabel: Trust SQL Server Certificates By Default
sqlServer.trustCertificateDescription: New SQL Server connections will trust server certificates automatically, which is friendlier for self-signed or private-CA environments.
sqlServer.trustCertificateHelp: Skip certificate-chain verification for new SQL Server connections unless disabled per connection

savedConnections.title: Saved Connections
savedConnections.description: Select a connection to load its details.
savedConnections.searchHint: Use Arrow keys to navigate, Enter to connect, Delete to remove.

queryHistory.title: Query History
queryHistory.disabledNotice: Query History recording is currently disabled in Settings. Existing records remain available.

aiCopilot.title: AI Copilot Workspace
aiCopilot.description: Schema-aware assistant for SQL generation, debugging, and optimization.
